name: Robin iSpiider
comment: Robin iSpiider™: Unlike other spiders, our new IP65 rated iSpiider®, with its highly advanced protective design, is perfectly happy to play in the rain!

capabilities.comment: PWM output frequency of LEDs: Standard (300Hz)
PWM output frequency of LEDs: High (600Hz)
Save Pixel index and Mirror to fixture
RoboSpot disabled - except handle faders and p/t
Ranbow effect (with fade time) from slow to fast
Ranbow effect (without fade time) from slow to fast
Fade time from min to max

gwSpecs.description: Unlike other spiders, our new IP65 rated iSpiider®, with its highly advanced protective design, is perfectly happy to play in the rain!
